name: vscode-git-worktree-batch-migrate
description: Run VS Code's built-in worktree migration flow for a predefined list of Git worktrees.

gitWorktreeBatch.targets.markdownDescription: Ordered list of worktrees to migrate into the current repository. Each entry may be an absolute path, a path relative to the current workspace folder, or a unique worktree folder name.

gitWorktreeBatch.continueOnError.markdownDescription: Continue with later configured worktrees after one migration fails. When disabled, the command stops on the first failure or merge-conflict state.
